notes_on_easing: Pattison's signature easing is cubic-bezier(0.62, 0.16, 0.13, 1.01) — a sharp-start, soft-finish curve giving content a confident, kinetic snap. Used across all enter/exit/scale/fade animations. Also uses standard cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) (Material standard) and cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1) (decelerate).

keyframes.enter: 0% { opacity: var(--tw-enter-opacity,1); transform: translate3d(...) scale3d(...) rotate(...); }
keyframes.exit: 100% { opacity: var(--tw-exit-opacity,1); transform: translate3d(...) scale3d(...) rotate(...); }
keyframes.enterFromRight: 0% { opacity:0; transform: translateX(64px); } 100% { opacity:1; transform: translateX(0); }
keyframes.enterFromLeft: 0% { opacity:0; transform: translateX(-64px); } 100% { opacity:1; transform: translateX(0); }
keyframes.exitToRight: 0% { opacity:1; transform: translateX(0); } 100% { opacity:0; transform: translateX(64px); }
keyframes.exitToLeft: 0% { opacity:1; transform: translateX(0); } 100% { opacity:0; transform: translateX(-64px); }
keyframes.scaleOut: 0% { opacity:1; transform: rotateX(0) scale(1); } 100% { opacity:0; transform: rotateX(-10deg) scale(0.95); }
keyframes.scaleIn: 0% { opacity:0; transform: rotateX(-10deg) scale(0.9); } 100% { opacity:1; transform: rotateX(0) scale(1); }
keyframes.contentShow: 0% { opacity:0; transform: translate(-50%,-48%) scale(0.96); } 100% { opacity:1; transform: translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1); }

fonts.fallback: Arial (with ascent-override: 90.49%, descent-override: 22.56%, size-adjust: 107.06% for CLS prevention)
fonts.icon_font: revicons (used by react-multi-carousel for prev/next arrows)
fonts.loading_strategy: font-display: swap, subset by unicode-range for performance
